name: Neo Metal Sonic (aka Parallel Movie Sonic)
description: Based off of an idea I had for Neo Metal Sonic is essentially in an alternate timeline of the Movieverse Sonic gets captured by Robotnik and gets robotisized becoming Metal Sonic. Over time he regains sentience and his memories but none of his emotions. Slowly, he secretly upgrades himself into his Neo Form with government equipment and increasing his intelligence by downloading government data into his memory cards. At some point he reveals that he’s regained his sentience and memories to Robotnik before killing him. He later encounters Knuckles and dispatches him quickly, but at the cost of destroying the Master Emerald. He then creates an army of Metal Sonic’s, the ones from the post credits scene, to do his bidding. Further down the line he finds a way to travel between dimensions, so he makes a ship to create these cross dimensional portals to travel to different universes, (IDW, Archie, Gameverse, etc...) and discovers that he is the only Sonic that got turned into a robot, filling him with rage and resentment. After years of dwelling in the Sonic Multiverse he comes up with an idea, switch minds with another Sonic, however the Sonic’s he attempts to switch places with are either too strong or protected by multiversal plot armor, until he discovers the Prime timeline of his universe, Movie Sonic...
creator: EmeraldGaming
